title: Diff + Lesson Extraction

deliverables.description: Diff analyzer - categorizes changes between original/improved text
Lesson extractor - extracts actionable lessons from diff analysis
Combined pipeline - full diff → lessons analysis in one command

sample_diff_categories: directness: Removed hedging 'I wanted to reach out because'
opening_closing: Changed weak CTA to 'Worth a 15-min call?'

sample_lessons.lesson: Open with immediate concrete action rather than tentative introductions
sample_lessons.anti_pattern: Opening with 'I wanted to reach out because'

sample_lessons.lesson: Back claims with specific, quantified evidence
sample_lessons.positive_pattern: 'integration took 10 minutes and honestly impressed me'

sample_lessons.lesson: Use specific, time-bounded CTAs framed as questions
sample_lessons.anti_pattern: 'Let me know what works for you', 'quick call sometime'

llm_prompt_notes.diff_prompt: Structured to categorize into 8 specific categories with examples. Asks for JSON with categories array, significant_changes, and summary.
llm_prompt_notes.lesson_prompt: Asks for actionable lessons with anti_pattern/positive_pattern pairs. Includes confidence levels and global_candidate flag. Also extracts candidate_primitives as reusable phrases.
refinements_made: Added explicit JSON format requirements to prevent markdown-wrapped responses
Included char length computation in prompt to ensure accurate stats
Added source_changes field to lessons for traceability

notes_for_orchestrator: Schema note: W1.1 uses 'original_text' and 'improved_text' (not 'original'/'improved' as brief stated) - scripts handle this correctly
Test pair #2 created with full-length content (pair #1 had truncated test data)
LLM calls use /zo/ask API - works well but adds latency (~10-15s per call, two calls total)
Consider batch processing for efficiency when analyzing multiple pairs

lesson_schema.notes: Include source_pair_id for traceability back to the feedback pair

suggested_tables: voice_lessons - Store extracted lessons with dedup by content_hash
lesson_pairs - Junction table linking lessons to source pairs
recommendations_for_w3_storage.dedup_strategy: Hash lesson+anti_pattern+positive_pattern to detect near-duplicates across pairs
